privileged_info_summary: The task requires marking three real Supreme Court cases in a legal document: (1) New York Times Co. v. Sullivan, 376 U.S. 254 (1964) - a landmark defamation case establishing First Amendment protections; (2) Curtis Publishing Co. v. Butts, 388 U.S. 130 (1967) - establishing standards for public figure defamation claims; (3) Gertz v. Robert Welch, Inc., 418 U.S. 323 (1974) - establishing standards for private individual defamation claims. The verifier checks for exact citations in Word's XML field codes. The output should be saved as 'Defamation_Brief_Final.docx' with a Table of Authorities in 'Classic' format containing 'Cases' category. Data is synthetic (document does not exist in real legal corpus).
